content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?  
Regime: CAUTION — low volatility (Vol: 20.7%) with very narrow participation (Breadth: 0/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?  
Retail & Food showing relative strength: MGROS (1W: +1.71% | 1M: +4.65%) ABOVE TREND; BIMAS (1W: +0.58% | 1M: +3.90%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?  
Energy & Chemicals and Technology lead the weakness: SISE (1W: -9.72% | 1M: -1.54%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -12.38% | 1M: -26.40%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?  
MGROS (1W: +1.71% | 1M: +4.65%) ABOVE TREND, BIMAS (1W: +0.58% | 1M: +3.90%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -1.96% | 1M: -6.72%) BELOW TREND, ENKAI (1W: -2.27% | 1M: -4.82%) BELOW TREND, SAHOL (1W: -2.68% | 1M: -6.88%) BELOW TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?  
VESTL (1W: -9.03% | 1M: -5.73%) BELOW TREND, SISE (1W: -9.72% | 1M: -1.54%) BELOW TREND, OYAKC (1W: -10.31% | 1M: -16.89%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -10.32% | 1M: +7.32%) CORRECTION, KRDMD (1W: -10.51% | 1M: +12.54%) CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?  
HEKTS (1W: -17.18% | 1M: +23.08%) CORRECTION, TKFEN (1W: -15.16% | 1M: +11.54%) CORRECTION, SASA (1W: -13.00% | 1M: -8.17%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -12.59% | 1M: -17.28%) BELOW TREND, KONTR (1W: -12.38% | 1M: -26.40%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?  
Banks are under pressure — AKBNK (1W: -5.02% | 1M: -11.52%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -2.70% | 1M: -5.26%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -3.99% | 1M: -5.12%) BELOW TREND; expect sensitivity to funding and FX flows.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?  
Mixed signals: EREGL (1W: -3.59% | 1M: +25.05%) CORRECTION, KRDMD (1W: -10.51% | 1M: +12.54%) CORRECTION, FROTO (1W: -7.92% | 1M: -18.18%) BELOW TREND; look for earnings/commodity triggers.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?  
Sector leadership has collapsed into selling — TUPRS (1W: -1.96% | 1M: -6.72%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -10.32% | 1M: +7.32%) CORRECTION, SISE (1W: -9.72% | 1M: -1.54%) BELOW TREND; high dispersion, trade cautiously.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?  
CAUTION — trim cyclicals and momentum longs, favor high-quality defensives and cash: overweight BIMAS (1W: +0.58% | 1M: +3.90%) ABOVE TREND and MGROS (1W: +1.71% | 1M: +4.65%) ABOVE TREND while waiting for breadth to recover.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?  
EREGL (1W: -3.59% | 1M: +25.05%) CORRECTION for mean-reversion, PETKM (1W: -10.32% | 1M: +7.32%) CORRECTION on volume spikes, HEKTS (1W: -17.18% | 1M: +23.08%) CORRECTION on volatility, BIMAS (1W: +0.58% | 1M: +3.90%) ABOVE TREND for defensive flows.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?  
Retail & Food for defensive flows, Energy & Chemicals for directional risk and volatility, Banking for sensitivity to FX and liquidity moves.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?  
Watch XU100 short-term support at the 1W lows and the 1M lows as the immediate triggers; key catalysts are domestic CPI and CBRT commentary, USD/TRY moves, and upcoming Q1 corporate earnings.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY  
Low-volatility but zero breadth creates a CAUTION regime — rally breadth is absent and selling is concentrated in Energy, Tech and Heavy Industry. Favor defensive Retail names (BIMAS, MGROS) and keep position sizes tight until breadth and macro catalysts validate a directional shift.
